title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLV. Gaffers And Gammers.
content:
There was an old woman sat spinning,
        And that's the first beginning;
        She had a calf,
        And that's half;
        She took it by the tail,
        And threw it over the wall,
        And that's all.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCLV. Gaffers And Gammers."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
